overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy night at a wooden harbor dock in a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2). The player moves past crate stacks and wooden warehouses, approaches a large crane overlooking moored sailboats, then turns back through an industrial dock area toward warehouse buildings and a steamboat.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock passage between cargo storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor formed by tall stacks of wooden crates toward a lit blue warehouse building

entered.detail: tall stacks of wooden shipping crates creating a corridor wall
two-story blue wooden building with warm yellow light glowing from windows and doorway
tall wooden pole with a lit lantern casting warm orange light on the wet deck
wet wooden dock planks reflecting the lamplight in the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night at a harbor dock, moving through a narrow passage flanked by towering wooden crate stacks. The camera approaches a blue wooden warehouse building with warm light glowing from within, while a wooden lamp post illuminates the wet deck planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock edge approaching harbor crane

events.description: exits the narrow crate corridor into the open dock edge with harbor water visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock edge with the water to the right, approaching the massive harbor crane structure

entered.detail: massive industrial crane structure with metal lattice boom extending over the water
wooden safety railing along the dock edge separating the walkway from the water
dark water of the harbor visible beyond the railing

segments.scene_description: Moving past the blue warehouse, the scene opens onto the dock edge with harbor water visible to the right beyond a wooden railing. The camera approaches the massive harbor crane that dominates the end of the pier, while rain continues to fall on the wet wooden planks.

events.description: camera pans right to reveal the harbor and moored sailboats

agents.ego_description: stopping at the dock edge to pan across the harbor view, observing the moored boats and distant lights

entered.detail: multiple sailboats with tall masts moored in the harbor, silhouetted against the dark water
warm lights from buildings across the harbor shimmering on the water surface
weathered wooden railing along the pier edge

segments.scene_description: Reaching the crane at the dock's end, the camera pans right to reveal a wide harbor view. Moored sailboats with tall masts sit in the dark water, while warm lights from distant buildings twinkle across the harbor in the rainy night.

events.description: turns left away from the water to head back inland through the dock area

agents.ego_description: turning away from the harbor view and walking back through the industrial dock area between warehouse buildings

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'NO SMOKING' mounted on a wooden post
weathered wooden industrial buildings with lit windows
organized stacks of wooden cargo crates and boxes

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the water, the camera moves back inland through the industrial dock area. A prominent 'NO SMOKING' sign stands ahead, while wooden warehouse buildings line the left side and stacks of cargo crates fill the center of the walkway.

events.description: approaching the numbered warehouse buildings and the docked steamboat

agents.ego_description: walking through the warehouse district toward the steamboat, passing numbered storage buildings

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse buildings marked with numbers '1' and '2' in white paint
large paddlewheel steamboat with two smokestacks docked at the pier, lit from within
multiple bright industrial floodlights illuminating the dock area

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the industrial warehouse district, passing large storage buildings numbered '1' and '2'. The camera approaches a grand paddlewheel steamboat docked at the pier, its windows glowing warmly against the dark rainy night, with industrial floodlights illuminating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy harbor dock that transitions from narrow industrial corridors to an open waterfront before returning to a bustling warehouse district. It begins by moving through a tight passage flanked by towering wooden crates, passing a blue warehouse where warm interior light spills onto the wet deck planks. As the camera moves past the building, the space opens up toward the pier's edge, leading directly to a massive harbor crane that dominates the skyline. The view then expands with a pan to the right, revealing moored sailboats and twinkling distant lights across the dark water, before turning back inland toward a prominent no smoking sign and cargo-filled walkways. Finally, the camera glides through the industrial district past numbered storage buildings to arrive at a grand paddlewheel steamboat, its glowing windows illuminated by overhead floodlights in the rainy night.
